## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Keep it concise but clear. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link to issue if any (e.g., Closes #123) -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

<!-- How did you test this change? Include reproduction steps if applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (coverage gates pass in `ligero-core`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under *Unreleased*
- [ ] No new dependencies in `ligero-core` (unless core-compatible)
- [ ] Cross-cutting behavior implemented as middleware / SPI adapter (not core)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] All conversations resolved
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
